title: andryala lyrata var. macrocephala
intro: Andryala lyrata var. macrocephala, also known as a variety of the Alpine penny-cress plant, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Andryala lyrata var. macrocephala include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb for topical applications. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant can be used to create teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied directly to the skin or used internally to support overall health and well-being.
